description.p: This is an unofficial Linux desktop client for the Proton Drive web service, built with Tauri to provide a native-feeling shell for managing files.

ul.li: Uses Proton Drive's web application for authentication, encryption, and file operations.
Independent community project; not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Proton AG.
Native Linux experience: Lightweight and optimized for performance.
Major release of the unofficial Linux client.
Expanded package target support: 17 release-gated targets across DEB, RPM, AppImage, Flatpak, Snap, AUR, and APK.
Full compatibility gate system with glibc and WebKitGTK validation.
Stable release of the unofficial Linux client.
Release pipeline updates to keep GitHub releases unblocked by Snap Store publishing.
Stable release of the unofficial Linux client.
Optimized build pipeline for multiple Linux distributions.
Full support for end-to-end encrypted file management.
